  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-mgmt             Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-mgmt/phpweathermap Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    net-mgmt/phpweathermap/files patch-editor.php patch-weathermap 
                                 pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  Weathermap is a network visualisation tool, to take data you already
  have and show you an overview of your network in map form.
  
  WWW:    http://www.network-weathermap.com/
  
  PR:             ports/153835
  Submitted by:   Hsin-Han You <hhyou at cs.nctu.edu.tw>
  Feature safe:   yes
